title: Mighty Moist Canadian Chicken Tacos
description: A pungent and pillowy post-workout dish featuring hard taco shells and poached chicken, with a macrobiotic-friendly twist.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, chopped cilantro, diced onion, and minced garlic.
Add the boneless chicken breasts to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
In a large pot, bring the poaching liquid to a boil and then reduce the heat to a simmer.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and add it to the poaching liquid.
Poach the chicken for 15-20 minutes or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the taco toppings by chopping the shredded lettuce and diced tomatoes.
Once the chicken is cooked, remove it from the poaching liquid and shred it into bite-sized pieces.
Warm the hard taco shells in the oven for 5-7 minutes.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the shredded chicken into the warm taco shells and topping with shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, and any other desired toppings.
